title: CustomSprays
description: Spray your memes on the walls !
body:
![CustomSprays](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LSDog/CustomSprays/master/media/banner.png) # **CustomSprays** 🎉 > 👇**usage** > > ![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f67e6f8188a95327143c8c0a201350076f6c2904.gif) > > **[click here to see the clearer gif](https://s1.ax1x.com/2022/04/18/Ldo6SK.gif)** ## （＾∀＾●）ﾉｼ ![Visits](https://count.getloli.com/get/@CustomSprays?darkmode=0) ## 📢 Introduction ___ | *Name* | *Content* | |:-------------------:|--------------------------------------------------------------| | ![logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LSDog/CustomSprays/master/media/logo64.png) | CustomSprays
花样喷漆 | | Author | LSDog | | Version | 1.5.23 | | Support | **1.7.10 ~ 26.1** (Bukkit Spigot Paper CatServer Mohist...) | | Cmd | `/sprays` - main command
`/spray` - spray an image
`/spray big` - spray a **big** image | | Perm | Please see "config.yml" | > > Links: > [Mcbbs](https://www.mcbbs.net/thread-1289391-1-1.html) > | [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/customsprays-upload-image-and-spray-it-on-the-wall.98979/) > | [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/customsprays-spray-your-image-like-in-source-games/) ## ⏬ **Download** → [Github Releases](https://github.com/LSDog/CustomSprays/releases) !! **⭐ [Spray sound resource pack](https://github.com/LSDog/CustomSprays/blob/master/spray_sound_pack.zip?raw=true) ! ⭐** **⭐ English message config is in config.yml (commented out by #) ⭐** ## ✨ Usage ___ ### Steps: 1 | Put "CustomSprays.jar" in "plugins" folder，restart the server. | | (now get ur image link) | 2 | Send command: /sprays upload - Upload image 3 | Send command: /spray - Spray at wall | 4 | 🎇 If server version ≥ 1.9，【Quick double click "F"】can also spray！🎇 ### 💻 Send "/sprays" for more commands ### 💻 See "config.yml" for more configurations ## 🎮 Version Support ___ > 📏 Supported **"region"** plugins: > - [x] Residence .......... [ *?* ~ 5.0.1.3+ ] > - [x] WorldGuard ......... [ 6.*?* ~ 7.*x* ] > - [x] GriefDefender ...... [ *?* ~ 2.1.4+ ] > > (newer versions should be ok) ## 🏆 Features ___ - 🙅‍ NO Bungeecord-side plugin，all the data storage in MySQL / yml - 📦 100% use packets【no interact with spray | no junk generated】 - 📐 Disable spraying in specific worlds or regions! - 📺 Custom spray item / sound effect！ - 👋 Copy others spray or prevent others from copying yours! - ☕ No API required ，making NMS sh-t by myself - 🔗 Player uploads link >> Zip & save image >> Spray self-destruct - 💴 Or use Vault cost players money for spraying！ ## Warning ___ > 🔺 Known problem ***[Only in version 1.7~1.12]***: When the map count is >32467 in a world (max 32767), spraying will make some original map replaced by spray image temporarily. > >> **Reason:** In these versions plugin uses id [32467~32767] to target the Mapview, so map with that id will be replaced. ## 💖 DONATE ME 💖 ___ ### Donate: [爱发电 | Aifadian](https://afdian.com/@LSDog) ![bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/CustomSprays.svg)
